channel.title: Rusty's Rustic Reads
channel.description: A cozy corner of the internet where Rusty shares thoughtful book reviews, deep dives into literature, and personal reflections on the stories that shape us.

item.title: Julius Caesar — First of the Caesars: A Review
item.description: A serious-but-readable review of Julius Caesar — First of the Caesars: how the book sets up Rome before Caesar, where it earns the Rubicon, and why the Ides of March hits as personal tragedy.

item.title: Iran War: Latest Developments as of May 4, 2026
item.description: Comprehensive update on the Iran War as of May 4, 2026, covering military, diplomatic, and humanitarian impacts across the Middle East.
